projects.name: RAG Reranker Study
projects.focus: 검색-생성 파이프라인에서 reranker 비용을 줄이면서 정확도를 유지하는 방법을 검증한다.

projects.name: LLM Reasoning
projects.focus: 추론 성능을 높이는 prompting, inference-time scaling, verifier 구조를 비교한다.

projects.name: Local Inference
projects.focus: 온디바이스 또는 로컬 GPU 환경에서 효율적인 추론 배포 전략을 정리한다.

rag-reranker.title: Reducing Reranker Costs in RAG via Adaptive Skipping
rag-reranker.abstract: Adaptive skipping reduces reranker calls in retrieval augmented generation systems by estimating confidence before expensive scoring. The approach preserves answer quality on BEIR-style evaluation while cutting reranker compute substantially.
rag-reranker.summary: Adaptive skipping reduces reranker calls while preserving answer quality on BEIR-like workloads.
keyPoints: Meaningful compute savings on BEIR-style tasks

llm-reasoning.title: Verifier-Guided Test-Time Scaling for LLM Reasoning
llm-reasoning.abstract: Verifier-guided decoding improves reasoning reliability by scoring candidate traces and allocating additional compute only when uncertainty is high. The method improves math and symbolic reasoning benchmarks while controlling inference cost.
llm-reasoning.summary: Adaptive verifier passes improve reasoning quality without paying full compute cost on every sample.
keyPoints: Compute scales with uncertainty instead of fixed depth
